title: How a perfectly even universe grew galaxies - Adam Brown
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews cosmologist Adam Brown on how galaxies formed from an initially uniform universe. The episode explores the mechanisms and physics behind cosmic structure formation from primordial conditions.
